Name: ExtractRequirements
Description: Single-step requirements extraction: RequirementsExtractor converts a plain-language description into a structured requirements document written to the workspace. Use this loop when a user describes a feature, problem, or design discussion and you want it materialised as a requirements file.
StartPrompt:
Extract structured requirements from the following input and write them as a requirements document to the workspace.

IMPORTANT: Before writing, use read_file to read .wally/Templates/RequirementsTemplate.md so your output exactly follows the project template. Then use list_files on .wally/Projects to discover the correct project folder. Then use write_file to create the requirements document at the appropriate path.

Input:
{userPrompt}
